tagline: Sweat the riddim in this smoky Brooklyn-to-Kingston fusion.
liner: Step into a club where air is thick and heat rises off polished gold. The male DJ trades fire with the female vocalist, their call-and-response chants echoing through a room filled with smoke and rhythm. This track blends dirty analog drums with punchy boom-bap kicks, creating an intimate yet sweaty atmosphere perfect for non-stop dancing. Feel the deep rolling sub bass thumping beneath skanking guitar chops and sharp piano stabs. As brass hits crash against organ bubbles, you'll move your waist to a groove that refuses to fade. Whether pouring more water or proving yourself bad in this intense environment, every second is pure intoxicating energy.
worldCaption: A smoky Brooklyn-to-Kingston nightclub where gold chains shine through haze and the bassline knocks the red cup over on a sweaty dance floor

bios.lead: Trades fiery call-and-response chants that heat the room up fast.
bios.drums: Keeps the floor shaking. Never misses a downbeat.
bios.other: Everything you feel but can't name.
